items.name: application-pro-reports-scheduled-reports-table
items.title: Scheduled Reports Table
items.description: Table of workspace delivery schedules with recurrence, recipient avatar stacks, format badges, last sent times, and run or edit actions per row.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-api-keys-panel
items.title: Api Keys Panel
items.description: API keys list with prefix-masked values, environment badges, created and last used dates, and a Revoke action.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-appearance-settings
items.title: Appearance Settings
items.description: Theme tile selector, accent color swatches, interface density toggle, and a reduce-motion Switch for personal look-and-feel.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-audit-log-settings
items.title: Audit Log Settings
items.description: Audit log configuration with a retention period select, an admins-only access note, a CSV export with recent export history, and an immutability callout.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-billing-alerts-settings
items.title: Billing Alerts Settings
items.description: Spend alert switches at 80 and 100 percent of plan, a hard-cap option with stated consequence, and a recipient email field.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-branding-settings
items.title: Branding Settings
items.description: Workspace branding panel with logo upload, accent color swatches, a subdomain field, and an honest note on where branding actually appears.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-connected-apps-settings
items.title: Connected Apps Settings
items.description: Ruled list of OAuth apps with scope badges, connected date, authorizing member, and an instant Revoke action per row.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-danger-zone-card
items.title: Danger Zone Card
items.description: Three escalating workspace actions stating exactly what each destroys and what survives, with outline buttons.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-data-retention-settings
items.title: Data Retention Settings
items.description: Per-data-type retention period Selects with export and deletion consequence panels, a legal hold note, and a save bar.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-email-domain-settings
items.title: Email Domain Settings
items.description: Sending domain panel with a monospace DNS record grid, per-record verified badges, a from-address field, and a deliverability fallback note for unverified domains.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-import-export-settings
items.title: Import Export Settings
items.description: Data portability panel with an export card listing every included data type and an import dropzone with a dry-run promise before any write.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-language-region-settings
items.title: Language Region Settings
items.description: Language and timezone selects with a live date and number format preview row and a first-day-of-week toggle.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-member-roles-table
items.title: Member Roles Table
items.description: Six permissions across three roles, with the honest custom roles roadmap note.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-notification-preferences
items.title: Notification Preferences
items.description: The email and in app switch matrix with the billing row locked on, honestly.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-profile-settings
items.title: Profile Settings
items.description: Profile panel with avatar upload, name and email inputs, a read-only timezone row, and a save bar.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-security-settings
items.title: Security Settings
items.description: Security panel with password row, two factor status, and a ruled active sessions list with per device revoke.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-session-timeout-settings
items.title: Session Timeout Settings
items.description: Session control panel with an idle timeout selector, a remember this device toggle, and a sign out all sessions action with its consequences listed.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-sso-and-domain-settings
items.title: Sso And Domain Settings
items.description: Verified domain, IdP metadata, and the enforce switch with its full consequence.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-team-settings
items.title: Team Settings
items.description: Team identity panel with name and identifier fields, a default member role Select, who-can-invite radio rows, and a discoverable toggle with its privacy consequence spelled out.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-two-factor-settings
items.title: Two Factor Settings
items.description: 2FA settings panel with authenticator app, SMS fallback, and backup codes rows plus a workspace-wide require 2FA toggle.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-webhooks-settings
items.title: Webhooks Settings
items.description: Webhook endpoint list with mono URLs, event Badges, per-row delivery status, a masked signing secret with reveal and roll actions, and retry policy prose.

items.name: application-pro-settings-pages-workspace-general-settings
items.title: Workspace General Settings
items.description: Workspace identity panel with name, slug, URL preview, rename warning, logo upload, and default role select.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-big-number-tiles
items.title: Big Number Tiles
items.description: Four oversized tiles for wallboards, deploys, incidents, latency, queue depth.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-comparison-stat-cards
items.title: Comparison Stat Cards
items.description: Three cards comparing This month and Last month side by side with a computed delta footer per metric.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-delta-list-card
items.title: Delta List Card
items.description: Compact card listing five metrics as ruled rows each with a tabular value and an up or down delta chip for a multi-metric movers panel.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-donut-stat-card
items.title: Donut Stat Card
items.description: Stat card with an inline SVG donut showing a 2 to 3 part breakdown beside the headline number and a ruled legend, no chart library.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-funnel-stat-card
items.title: Funnel Stat Card
items.description: Acquisition funnel card with four shrinking horizontal bars, step conversion percentages, and an end-to-end rate headline.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-goal-progress-cards
items.title: Goal Progress Cards
items.description: Three Q2 goal cards each with a progress bar, current vs target value, and a projected pace line.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-heatmap-stat-card
items.title: Heatmap Stat Card
items.description: Activity heatmap card with a CSS grid of cells shaded by foreground opacity across hours and days, no chart lib.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-kpi-cards-row
items.title: Kpi Cards Row
items.description: Four headline metrics with deltas and the context line that stops misreadings.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-live-counter-card
items.title: Live Counter Card
items.description: An active user counter with a pulsing dot, a static sparkline, and an honest refresh cadence footnote.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-metric-with-target-card
items.title: Metric With Target Card
items.description: A single metric versus its target on a horizontal progress track with the gap and pace stated plainly.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-multi-metric-card
items.title: Multi Metric Card
items.description: One card holding three related metrics in a row with vertical dividers, each showing a value, label, and small delta.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-north-star-metric-card
items.title: North Star Metric Card
items.description: One hero metric with a sparkline and a versioned definition against drift.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-progress-ring-card
items.title: Progress Ring Card
items.description: Stat card with a centered inline SVG progress ring showing a single percentage, a used of total sub-line, and a plan limit footer row.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-segmented-stat-card
items.title: Segmented Stat Card
items.description: A headline total with a stacked horizontal bar and legend showing the breakdown by source or category.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-sparkline-grid-card
items.title: Sparkline Grid Card
items.description: A card with a 2x2 grid of compact metrics each paired with an inline SVG sparkline, no chart library.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-stat-with-breakdown-list
items.title: Stat With Breakdown List
items.description: One wide card with a headline user count and a ruled breakdown list by plan with counts and share percentages.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-stats-with-sparklines
items.title: Stats With Sparklines
items.description: Four stat cards with decorative inline SVG sparklines showing value, delta, and trailing 7 week trend.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-status-tiles-row
items.title: Status Tiles Row
items.description: Ops summary strip of four Badge-styled status tiles showing service counts for Operational, Degraded, Partial outage, and Maintenance.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-streak-card
items.title: Streak Card
items.description: A consistency card showing a current streak count, an inline SVG week-row of filled and empty day cells, and supporting stats.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-team-leaderboard-stats
items.title: Team Leaderboard Stats
items.description: Five teammates ranked by tickets closed, equal styling, a quality caveat footer.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-threshold-alert-card
items.title: Threshold Alert Card
items.description: A stat card in breach state showing a live metric against its configured threshold with a calm next-action line.

items.name: application-pro-stat-cards-trend-comparison-tiles
items.title: Trend Comparison Tiles
items.description: Two side by side tiles comparing the same metric across two segments with values, deltas, and a summary read.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-component-status-list
items.title: Component Status List
items.description: Editable internal status list with a per-row Select for Operational, Degraded, Partial outage, or Down and a publish to status page action.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-dependency-map-blueprint
items.title: Dependency Map Blueprint
items.description: Static architecture health map with service nodes on an SVG grid, connecting lines, and a degraded dependency highlighted.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-incident-banner
items.title: Incident Banner
items.description: Slim dismissible incident alert bar with the incident start time, a status page link, and a subscribe affordance.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-incident-timeline
items.title: Incident Timeline
items.description: Incident detail card with a resolved header, a four-phase chronological update rail, and a postmortem link at the foot.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-maintenance-window-card
items.title: Maintenance Window Card
items.description: Scheduled maintenance notice showing the UTC window, timezone conversions, affected services, and a remind-me email affordance.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-past-incidents-list
items.title: Past Incidents List
items.description: Resolved incidents grouped by month with duration, impact summary, and a postmortem link per row.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-service-health-table
items.title: Service Health Table
items.description: Internal ops table listing services with status badges, p95 latency, error rate, last incident time, and the on-call engineer avatar.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-sla-summary-card
items.title: Sla Summary Card
items.description: SLA card showing the uptime target, actual this period, error budget bar, and the last published breach record.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-status-page
items.title: Status Page
items.description: Public status page with an overall operational banner, per-service uptime badges, 90-day tick strips, and a subscribe affordance.

items.name: application-pro-status-health-uptime-grid
items.title: Uptime Grid
items.description: 30-day per-service reliability grid with each cell shaded by status using foreground opacity tokens and a per-row uptime figure.

items.name: application-pro-tasks-todos-assigned-to-me-list

items.description: Personal task queue grouped by Overdue, Today, and This week, each row showing a project badge, checkbox, and due date.

items.name: application-pro-tasks-todos-my-day-panel

items.description: Eisenhower-style 2x2 grid with task chips in each urgency and importance quadrant, per-quadrant counts, and a note that Do Now should be the emptiest column.

items.name: application-pro-tasks-todos-task-comments-panel

items.name: application-pro-tasks-todos-task-filters-bar

items.description: Interactive filter toolbar with assignee, status, priority, and due chips, active-filter tokens, a saved-view dropdown, and a live task count.

items.name: application-pro-tasks-todos-task-list

items.name: application-pro-teams-orgs-permissions-matrix

items.name: application-pro-teams-orgs-role-assignment-panel

items.description: A panel for editing a workspace member role with a role selector listing permission descriptions, a scope list, and an effective immediately callout.

items.name: application-pro-teams-orgs-seat-allocation-card
items.title: Seat Allocation Card
items.description: Seat usage panel showing total, used, and free seats with a per-team breakdown and an honest end-of-cycle removal note.

items.name: application-pro-teams-orgs-team-detail-card
items.title: Team Detail Card

items.name: application-pro-teams-orgs-team-directory

items.description: A searchable grid of member cards with avatar, role, team badge, and online status dot for finding people across the workspace.

items.name: application-pro-teams-orgs-team-switcher-blueprint
items.title: Team Switcher Blueprint

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-dependency-list
items.title: Dependency List
items.description: Roadmap item dependency panel with blocked-by and blocking sections, each row showing status and an inline blocking note.

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-gantt-rows
items.title: Gantt Rows
items.description: CSS-grid Gantt chart with a task-name column, week-column timeline, positioned duration bars with in-progress fills, and a today line.

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-milestone-tracker
items.title: Milestone Tracker
items.description: Vertical stepper of four milestones with done, in-progress, and upcoming status, owner avatars, target dates, and progress bars.

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-now-next-later
items.title: Now Next Later
items.description: Compact roadmap list with three sections each showing initiative rows with a confidence chip and an honest status note per item.

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-quarter-planner
items.title: Quarter Planner
items.description: Q3 roadmap grid with CSS span bars, capacity hints, and status badges for 8 initiatives across 5 teams.

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-release-timeline
items.title: Release Timeline
items.description: Horizontal release rail showing shipped, current, and upcoming version markers each with a date and a one-line scope note.

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-roadmap-board
items.title: Roadmap Board
items.description: Product roadmap board with Now, Next, and Later columns showing initiative cards with team badges, quarter chips, and progress bars.

items.name: application-pro-timeline-roadmap-sprint-timeline
items.title: Sprint Timeline
items.description: Sprint at-a-glance panel with a capacity versus committed summary, a ten-day CSS-grid task board, and a today line across all rows.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-automation-builder
items.title: Automation Builder
items.description: Vertical trigger, filter, and action step editor with dashed connectors, a Draft badge, and Save automation for a single linear flow.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-automation-error-card
items.title: Automation Error Card
items.description: Failed automation card with the error in plain words, a retry meter showing attempts used and remaining, and a payload replay affordance.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-automation-templates-grid
items.title: Automation Templates Grid
items.description: Template gallery with six categorised automation cards, use counts, a search field, and a start-from-scratch tile.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-condition-branch-card
items.title: Condition Branch Card
items.description: Branch decision panel with an If row of field, operator, and value chips, Then and Else path summaries, and an add condition affordance.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-run-detail-panel
items.title: Run Detail Panel
items.description: Automation run debugger showing the run header, a per step status list, and the input and output of the failed step expanded.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-run-history-table
items.title: Run History Table
items.description: Automation execution log with timestamp, automation name, status badge, duration, items affected, and inline error text on failed rows.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-trigger-action-row
items.title: Trigger Action Row
items.description: Automations index with ruled rows summarising each automation as trigger to action text, a live Switch, last run time, and run count.

items.name: application-pro-workflow-automation-workflow-canvas-blueprint
items.title: Workflow Canvas Blueprint
items.description: Static node-graph canvas with four positioned cards connected by dashed SVG lines, parallel branches, a merge node, and a zoom toolbar.

items.name: application-ai-prompt-welcome-page
items.title: Welcome Page
items.description: A welcome screen with a centered prompt field, suggested actions, and a short intro. Greets users and invites the first message in an AI assistant.

items.name: application-application-stats-simple-cards
items.title: Simple Cards
items.description: Clean metric cards that display a label and a single number set side by side. Use across a dashboard header to surface key totals at a glance.

items.name: application-application-stats-with-badges
items.title: With Badges
items.description: Stat cards pairing each number with a small badge that shows change or trend. Use to flag growth or decline next to revenue and signup totals.

items.name: application-application-stats-with-colored-icons
items.title: With Colored Icons
items.description: Metric cards that pair each figure with a tinted icon set in a colored circle. Use to make categories easy to scan on a busy analytics dashboard.

items.name: application-application-stats-with-description
items.title: With Description
items.description: Stat cards that place a short line of context under each number. Use when a raw figure needs explanation, like a comparison to the prior month.

items.name: application-application-stats-with-icons
items.title: With Icons
items.description: Metric cards with a small icon beside every value for quick recognition. Use on overview screens where users skim totals by category very fast.

items.name: application-application-stats-with-progress
items.title: With Progress
items.description: Stat cards that pair a number with a progress bar moving toward a target. Use to show goal completion for revenue, storage, or active user counts.

items.name: application-form-layouts-complex-form
items.title: Complex Form
items.description: A dense form with grouped sections, multiple field types, and a sticky action bar. Use it for detailed settings, account creation, or admin record editing.

items.name: application-form-layouts-stacked
items.title: Stacked
items.description: A single column form with labels stacked above each input and a clear submit action. Ideal for short flows like sign in, contact, or quick profile edits.

items.name: application-form-layouts-two-column
items.title: Two Column
items.description: A form split into two columns of fields with a shared header and footer actions. Use it for longer profiles or billing details that fit a wider screen.

items.name: application-login-split-with-image
items.title: Split With Image
items.description: A two panel login screen pairing a sign in form with a side image. Use it to add brand personality to authentication on web apps and dashboards.

items.name: application-page-headings-simple-centered
items.title: Simple Centered
items.description: A centered page title with optional description text, balanced on the screen. Use it on focused app views like settings or a single record detail.

items.name: application-page-headings-with-actions
items.title: With Actions
items.description: A page title paired with buttons on the right for primary and secondary actions. Use it atop list or detail views where users create or edit.

items.name: application-page-headings-with-search-filters
items.title: With Search Filters
items.description: A page title with a search field and filter controls sitting below it. Use it on data heavy screens so users narrow long tables and lists fast.

items.name: application-page-headings-with-stats
items.title: With Stats
items.description: A page title sitting above a row of key metrics like totals and trends. Use it on dashboards to frame the view and surface numbers at a glance.

items.name: application-page-headings-with-steps
items.title: With Steps
items.description: A page title with a numbered step indicator that shows progress. Use it across multi screen flows like onboarding, checkout, or a setup wizard.

items.name: application-page-headings-with-tabs
items.title: With Tabs
items.description: A page title with a row of tabs beneath it for switching sections. Use it on profile or settings screens that split content across many views.

items.name: application-reset-password-email-otp-reset
items.title: Email OTP Reset
items.description: A reset password form that emails a one time code, then prompts users to enter the OTP digits before setting a new password. Use for secure email recovery.

items.name: application-reset-password-security-question-reset
items.title: Security Question Reset
items.description: A reset password form that verifies identity with a saved security question and answer before allowing a new password. Use as a passwordless recovery path.

items.name: application-reset-password-simple-reset
items.title: Simple Reset
items.description: A clean reset password form with new password and confirm fields plus a submit button. Use on the final step after a user clicks a recovery link.

items.name: application-reset-password-token-reset
items.title: Token Reset
items.description: A reset password form that reads a token from the recovery link, confirms it, then collects a new password. Use to complete a tokened email reset flow.

items.name: application-user-profiles-billing
items.title: Billing
items.description: A profile billing view with current plan, payment method, invoice history, and an upgrade prompt. Use it where members manage subscriptions and receipts.

items.name: application-user-profiles-compact-list
items.title: Compact List
items.description: A dense list of user profiles with avatar, name, role, and quick actions per row. Fits admin tables and directories where space stays tight.

items.name: application-user-profiles-developer
items.title: Developer
items.description: A developer profile with API keys, access tokens, connected apps, and usage notes. Use it on settings pages where engineers manage their integrations.

items.name: application-user-profiles-onboarding
items.title: Onboarding
items.description: A guided profile setup with steps for avatar, name, and preferences. Use it right after signup to help new users finish their account quickly.

items.name: application-user-profiles-permissions
items.title: Permissions
items.description: A profile permissions panel listing roles and toggles for what a member can view or edit. Use it where admins grant access across an application.

items.name: application-user-profiles-security-logs
items.title: Security Logs
items.description: A profile security view showing recent sign ins, devices, locations, and times. Use it so members can spot odd activity and protect their account.

items.name: application-user-profiles-simple
items.title: Simple
items.description: A clean profile card with avatar, name, bio, and a few key details. Use it for a focused account summary on dashboards or member directory pages.

items.name: application-user-profiles-tabbed
items.title: Tabbed
items.description: A profile layout split into tabs for account, security, and notifications. Use it to organize many settings without crowding a single long page.

items.name: application-user-profiles-team-grid
items.title: Team Grid
items.description: A grid of teammate profiles with photos, titles, and contact buttons. Use it on an about page or internal directory to introduce the whole team.

items.name: application-user-profiles-with-stats
items.title: With Stats
items.description: A profile header paired with metrics like followers, posts, and reputation. Use it on social or community pages to show a member at a glance.

items.name: components-accordions-border-fade-accordion
items.title: Border Fade Accordion
items.description: An accordion where each item border softly fades on open. Adds a quiet visual cue for active panels in FAQs and settings without loud styling.

items.name: components-accordions-card-accordion
items.title: Card Accordion
items.description: An accordion built from separated cards, each panel raised on its own surface. Good for FAQs or feature details that need clear visual separation.

items.name: components-accordions-dash-line-accordion
items.title: Dash Line Accordion
items.description: An accordion divided by dashed lines between items. The light dashed rhythm keeps long FAQ lists readable while staying subtle and unobtrusive.

items.name: components-accordions-dotted-border-accordion
items.title: Dotted Border Accordion
items.description: An accordion framed by a dotted border around each panel. The playful dotted outline suits informal FAQs, help docs, and friendly onboarding tips.

items.name: components-accordions-double-border-accordion
items.title: Double Border Accordion
items.description: An accordion with a double line framing every item. The layered borders add clear structure for FAQs and specs where rows need firm definition.

items.name: components-accordions-fade-in-content-accordion
items.title: Fade In Content Accordion
items.description: An accordion whose answer text gently fades in as a panel opens. The soft entrance keeps reader focus on the revealed content in FAQs and guides.

items.name: components-accordions-floating-label-accordion
items.title: Floating Label Accordion
items.description: An accordion where the question label lifts up as the panel opens. The floating title keeps context visible while reading through long FAQ answers.

items.name: components-accordions-glow-border-accordion
items.title: Glow Border Accordion
items.description: An accordion with a glowing border on the open item. The lit edge draws the eye to the active panel, fitting dark themes and modern product FAQs.

items.name: components-accordions-highlight-active-accordion
items.title: Highlight Active Accordion
items.description: An accordion that tints the background of the open item. The highlighted row keeps your place in long FAQ lists and dense product documentation.

items.name: components-accordions-minimal-line-accordion
items.title: Minimal Line Accordion
items.description: An accordion with thin divider lines and no boxes at all. The stripped back style fits clean FAQs, sidebars, and content heavy marketing pages.

items.name: components-accordions-nested-border-accordion
items.title: Nested Border Accordion
items.description: An accordion supporting nested items inside bordered panels. Use it for layered FAQs, docs, and settings where topics branch into subtopics.

items.name: components-accordions-numbered-accordion
items.title: Numbered Accordion
items.description: An accordion with a number beside every question. The counted order suits step guides, ranked FAQs, and any sequence readers follow in turn.

items.name: components-accordions-shadow-reveal-accordion
items.title: Shadow Reveal Accordion
items.description: An accordion that lifts each item with a soft shadow on open. The raised panel clearly signals the active answer in FAQs and feature breakdowns.

items.name: components-accordions-stepped-accordion
items.title: Stepped Accordion
items.description: An accordion styled as numbered steps with connecting markers. Ideal for setup flows, tutorials, and any process that readers complete in order.

items.name: components-accordions-thick-side-border-accordion
items.title: Thick Side Border Accordion
items.description: An accordion with a bold colored bar down the side of each item. The thick accent marks active rows in FAQs and grabs reader attention quickly.

items.name: components-accordions-underline-accordion
items.title: Underline Accordion
items.description: An accordion where each question sits above a single underline. The clean text first look fits editorial FAQs and quiet, tidy help sections.

items.name: components-alerts-accent-border-alerts
items.title: Accent Border Alerts
items.description: Alerts with a colored bar on the left edge that signals tone at a glance. Use for status messages where the color cue matters more than the icon.

items.name: components-alerts-all-sides-accent-alerts
items.title: All Sides Accent Alerts
items.description: Alerts framed by a colored border on every side for strong emphasis. Use when a notice must stand out clearly against a busy page or dashboard.

items.name: components-alerts-basic-alerts
items.title: Basic Alerts
items.description: Plain alerts with an icon, title, and message in a soft container. Use for everyday notices like saved changes, confirmations, and short tips.

items.name: components-alerts-bottom-accent-alerts
items.title: Bottom Accent Alerts
items.description: Alerts with a colored underline along the bottom edge for a subtle cue. Use for inline messages in forms or cards that need only light emphasis.

items.name: components-alerts-compact-alerts
items.title: Compact Alerts
items.description: Slim alerts with tight padding and a single line of text inside. Use in dense layouts, tables, or sidebars where vertical space stays limited.

items.name: components-alerts-dashed-border-alerts
items.title: Dashed Border Alerts
items.description: Alerts outlined with a dashed border for a lighter, sketch like feel. Use for draft notices, placeholders, or optional tips in a quiet tone.

items.name: components-alerts-dismissible-alerts
items.title: Dismissible Alerts
items.description: Alerts with a close button so users can clear a notice once read. Use for cookie banners, promotions, and warnings that should not stay forever.

items.name: components-alerts-dotted-border-alerts
items.title: Dotted Border Alerts
items.description: Alerts wrapped in a dotted border for a soft, playful outline. Use for casual reminders, tips, or low priority notes in friendly interfaces.

items.name: components-alerts-double-border-alerts
items.title: Double Border Alerts
items.description: Alerts with a layered double border for a refined, framed look. Use to highlight important notices that deserve extra visual weight on a page.

items.name: components-alerts-elevated-alerts
items.title: Elevated Alerts
items.description: Alerts raised with a soft shadow so they lift off the surface. Use for floating notifications or messages that should feel above the content.

items.name: components-alerts-frosted-glass-alerts
items.title: Frosted Glass Alerts
items.description: Alerts with a blurred, translucent backdrop that reveals content behind. Use over images or hero sections where a glassy notice fits the design.

items.name: components-alerts-glow-border-alerts
items.title: Glow Border Alerts
items.description: Alerts ringed by a soft glowing border that draws the eye gently. Use for promotions or new feature notices that need a warm, inviting accent.

items.name: components-alerts-icon-only-alerts
items.title: Icon Only Alerts
items.description: Compact alerts that pair a status icon with a short message and no title. Use for quick inline feedback where space is tight and tone is clear.

items.name: components-alerts-inset-alerts
items.title: Inset Alerts
items.description: Alerts with an inset shadow that sinks slightly into the surface. Use for grouped notices inside cards or panels that feel part of the layout.

items.name: components-alerts-monospace-alerts
items.title: Monospace Alerts
items.description: Alerts set in a monospace typeface for a technical, code style tone. Use for build output, terminal messages, or warnings aimed at developers.

items.name: components-alerts-outlined-alerts
items.title: Outlined Alerts
items.description: Alerts defined only by a clean border with no fill behind the text. Use on colored or busy backgrounds where a solid panel would feel heavy.

items.name: components-alerts-paper-alerts
items.title: Paper Alerts
items.description: Alerts styled like a paper card with subtle texture and soft edges. Use for printed style notices, receipts, or warm document driven layouts.

items.name: components-alerts-pulse-border-alerts
items.title: Pulse Border Alerts
items.description: Alerts with a border that gently pulses to catch attention over time. Use for live updates, countdowns, or urgent notices that should not be missed.

items.name: components-alerts-right-accent-alerts
items.title: Right Accent Alerts
items.description: Alerts with a colored bar on the right edge for a mirrored accent. Use in right aligned layouts or when the left side already holds an icon.

items.name: components-alerts-top-accent-alerts
items.title: Top Accent Alerts
items.description: Alerts topped with a colored bar across the upper edge for a header cue. Use for grouped notices where the accent reads like a small banner.

items.name: components-badges-3d-badge
items.title: 3D Badge
items.description: A badge with layered shadows and depth that lifts off the surface. Use it to spotlight a featured tag or premium label that needs to stand out.

items.name: components-badges-bounce-badge
items.title: Bounce Badge
items.description: A badge with a springy bounce animation that draws the eye on entry. Use it to flag new arrivals or fresh updates that should grab attention.

items.name: components-badges-dot-indicator-badge
items.title: Dot Indicator Badge
items.description: A badge paired with a small colored dot that shows status at a glance. Use it to show online, busy, or away states next to a name or avatar.

items.name: components-badges-elevated-badge
items.title: Elevated Badge
items.description: A badge raised above the surface with a soft drop shadow. Use it to mark a priority label or count that should read as floating above content.

items.name: components-badges-extra-large-badge
items.title: Extra Large Badge
items.description: An oversized badge with generous padding and bold text for high visibility. Use it on hero areas or banners where a tag must read from a distance.

items.name: components-badges-gradient-border-badge
items.title: Gradient Border Badge
items.description: A badge wrapped in a colorful gradient outline around plain fill. Use it to mark beta, pro, or featured labels that need a vivid accent edge.

items.name: components-badges-hover-scale-badge
items.title: Hover Scale Badge
items.description: A badge that grows slightly when the pointer rests on it. Use it for interactive tags or filters where a touch of feedback invites a quick click.

items.name: components-badges-icon-badge
items.title: Icon Badge
items.description: A badge that pairs a small icon with a label for instant meaning. Use it to tag categories, statuses, or actions where text alone reads slowly.

items.name: components-badges-large-badge
items.title: Large Badge
items.description: A roomy badge with extra padding and larger text for clear reading. Use it to highlight a plan tier, count, or status across busy interfaces.

items.name: components-badges-pulse-badge
items.title: Pulse Badge
items.description: A badge with a soft pulsing ring that radiates outward on a loop. Use it to signal live activity, unread items, or a recording session in progress.

items.name: components-badges-ribbon-badge
items.title: Ribbon Badge
items.description: A badge styled as a corner ribbon that drapes over a card edge. Use it to flag sale, new, or sold out states across product and gallery tiles.

items.name: components-badges-square-badge
items.title: Square Badge
items.description: A badge with sharp square corners and a compact footprint. Use it for crisp version tags, counts, or labels that suit a structured grid layout.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-background-breadcrumb
items.title: Background Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb trail wrapped in a soft tinted background bar. Anchors the top of a page and keeps navigation links readable above busy content.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-bordered-breadcrumb
items.title: Bordered Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb sitting inside a thin outlined container. Frames the navigation path cleanly on a dashboard header or any content section toolbar.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-card-breadcrumb
items.title: Card Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb housed in a rounded card with a subtle shadow. Lifts the navigation path off the page for detail views and account settings screens.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-compact-breadcrumb
items.title: Compact Breadcrumb
items.description: A tight breadcrumb with reduced spacing between its links. Fits crowded toolbars and mobile headers where horizontal room is in short supply.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-dot-breadcrumb
items.title: Dot Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb that separates each link with a small round dot. Offers a quiet, minimal path indicator for clean app layouts and page headers.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-icon-breadcrumb
items.title: Icon Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb pairing each link with a leading icon. Helps users scan the path at a glance across sections like home, docs, billing, and settings.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-numbered-breadcrumb
items.title: Numbered Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb that numbers each step in the path. Clarifies order for sequential flows such as checkout, onboarding, or a multi step setup wizard.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-pill-breadcrumb
items.title: Pill Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb where each link sits inside a rounded pill shape. Adds a friendly, tappable feel to navigation on dashboards and profile pages.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-progress-breadcrumb
items.title: Progress Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb with a fill that tracks how far a user has moved. Shows completion across multi step forms, checkout, and guided account onboarding.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-slash-breadcrumb
items.title: Slash Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb that divides its links with a forward slash. Mirrors a file path style for code tools, documentation, and folder browsing screens.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-sticky-breadcrumb
items.title: Sticky Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb that pins to the top of the view as the page scrolls. Keeps the current location visible on long articles and deep settings pages.

items.name: components-breadcrumbs-timeline-breadcrumb
items.title: Timeline Breadcrumb
items.description: A breadcrumb laid out as a connected timeline of steps. Maps a journey through stages, ideal for order tracking and live project status views.

items.name: components-buttons-border-animation-buttons
items.title: Border Animation Buttons
items.description: Buttons with borders that animate and trace around the edge on hover. Draw attention to a primary action without changing the button fill at rest.

items.name: components-buttons-cut-corners-buttons
items.title: Cut Corners Buttons
items.description: Buttons with angled, clipped corners for a sharp geometric look. Fits gaming, tech, or editorial interfaces that want an edgy call to action.

items.name: components-buttons-extra-large-buttons
items.title: Extra Large Buttons
items.description: Oversized buttons with generous padding and large type. Use them as the main hero call to action where one tap should be impossible to miss.

items.name: components-buttons-extra-small-buttons
items.title: Extra Small Buttons
items.description: Compact, low height buttons with tight padding and small type. Ideal for dense toolbars, table rows, and inline controls where space is limited.

items.name: components-buttons-grow-buttons
items.title: Grow Buttons
items.description: Buttons that scale up smoothly on hover to feel responsive. Add a touch of motion feedback to cards, pricing tiers, and primary form actions.

items.name: components-buttons-interactive-buttons
items.title: Interactive Buttons
items.description: Buttons that react to hover and click with motion and state changes. Make signups, downloads, and key actions feel alive and worth clicking.

items.name: components-buttons-liquid-buttons
items.title: Liquid Buttons
items.description: Buttons with a flowing liquid fill that sweeps across the surface on hover. A playful accent for landing pages and creative product sites today.

items.name: components-buttons-morphing-buttons
items.title: Morphing Buttons
items.description: Buttons that morph their shape, size, or label between states. Use for loading, success, and submit flows that confirm progress to the user.

items.name: components-buttons-pixel-buttons
items.title: Pixel Buttons
items.description: Buttons with a blocky pixel art finish and retro styling. Perfect for games, indie projects, and brands that lean on a nostalgic visual theme.

items.name: components-buttons-pulse-buttons
items.title: Pulse Buttons
items.description: Buttons with a soft pulsing glow that draws the eye over time. Highlight a single primary action like start trial or buy now on a busy page.

items.name: components-buttons-rotate-buttons
items.title: Rotate Buttons
items.description: Buttons that rotate an icon or the whole label on hover. Add subtle motion to refresh, settings, and other action icons across your app today.

items.name: components-buttons-shadow-buttons
items.title: Shadow Buttons
items.description: Buttons with layered shadows that lift or shift on hover. Give actions a tactile, raised feel across cards, forms, and toolbars in any layout.

items.name: components-buttons-skew-buttons
items.title: Skew Buttons
items.description: Buttons with a skewed, slanted shape for a sense of dynamic energy. Suits sports, fitness, and bold marketing pages that want forward momentum.

items.name: components-buttons-slide-buttons
items.title: Slide Buttons
items.description: Buttons with a color or label that slides in on hover. Reveal a second state to guide users toward the next step in a clear and simple flow.

items.name: components-buttons-social-buttons
items.title: Social Buttons
items.description: Buttons branded for Google, GitHub, Apple, and more providers. Drop them into sign in and sign up screens for fast one click authentication.

items.name: components-buttons-squeeze-buttons
items.title: Squeeze Buttons
items.description: Buttons that squeeze inward on press for satisfying tactile feedback. Use on mobile flows and forms where every tap should feel confirmed fast.

items.name: components-buttons-underline-buttons
items.title: Underline Buttons
items.description: Buttons styled with an animated underline that grows in on hover. A clean, minimal accent for text links and quiet secondary actions in any UI.

items.name: components-cards-border-accent-card
items.title: Border Accent Card
items.description: A card with a colored accent line along one edge that draws the eye. Use it to group related text and labels while signaling category or status.

items.name: components-cards-border-animation-card
items.title: Border Animation Card
items.description: A card whose border traces a moving outline around the edges. Use it to spotlight a featured plan, offer, or item that needs attention on the page.

items.name: components-cards-border-gradient-animation-card
items.title: Border Gradient Animation Card
items.description: A card framed by a shifting gradient border that flows around the edges. Use it to highlight a premium tier or hero item in a grid of options.

items.name: components-cards-border-highlight-card
items.title: Border Highlight Card
items.description: A card that brightens its border when focused or hovered. Use it to mark the recommended choice in a pricing grid or a selected option in a form.

items.name: components-cards-corner-ribbon-card
items.title: Corner Ribbon Card
items.description: A card with a diagonal ribbon pinned to one corner for a short label. Use it to flag New, Sale, or Featured items in a product or listing grid.

items.name: components-cards-cutout-border-card
items.title: Cutout Border Card
items.description: A card with a notched border that carves out shape along its edge. Use it for tickets, coupons, or passes where a distinct outline reads as a stub.

items.name: components-cards-dashed-border-card
items.title: Dashed Border Card
items.description: A card outlined with a dashed border for a light, sketch feel. Use it for empty states, upload zones, or placeholders that invite the user to add content.

items.name: components-cards-double-border-card
items.title: Double Border Card
items.description: A card wrapped in two stacked outlines for a framed, formal look. Use it for certificates, awards, or quotes that deserve emphasis on the page.

items.name: components-cards-expandable-card
items.title: Expandable Card

items.name: components-cards-gradient-border-card
items.title: Gradient Border Card

items.name: components-cards-hover-effect-card
items.title: Hover Effect Card
items.description: A card that lifts, scales, or shades when the pointer moves over it. Use it for clickable tiles in a gallery, menu, or dashboard to signal they react.

items.name: components-cards-hover-reveal-card
items.title: Hover Reveal Card
items.description: A card that hides extra text or actions until hover uncovers them. Use it for portfolio tiles or features where the cover stays clean until needed.

items.name: components-cards-icon-card
items.title: Icon Card
items.description: A card led by a single icon above a short title and blurb. Use it for feature grids, service lists, or steps where a glyph anchors each point made.

items.name: components-cards-magnetic-card
items.title: Magnetic Card
items.description: A card that drifts toward the cursor as it nears, with a subtle pull. Use it for playful landing pages or feature tiles that reward a hovering pointer.

items.name: components-cards-neon-border-card
items.title: Neon Border Card
items.description: A card ringed by a glowing neon outline that pops on dark backgrounds. Use it for gaming, music, or tech pages where a bright frame fits the mood.

items.name: components-cards-perspective-hover-card
items.title: Perspective Hover Card
items.description: A card that rotates in 3D space as the pointer crosses it for depth. Use it for hero items or showcases where motion makes a tile feel tactile.

items.name: components-cards-progress-card
items.title: Progress Card
items.description: A card pairing a progress bar with a label and value reading. Use it to show task completion, goals, or usage limits inside a dashboard or account view.

items.name: components-cards-pulse-border-card
items.title: Pulse Border Card
items.description: A card with a border that pulses softly to draw a glance over. Use it for live alerts, fresh items, or a call to action that should feel active now.

items.name: components-cards-shimmer-effect-card
items.title: Shimmer Effect Card
items.description: A card with a light sweep that glides across its surface. Use it as a loading skeleton or to add gentle motion to a featured tile in a busy grid.

items.name: components-cards-stacked-card

items.description: A card layered over offset copies to suggest a deck behind it. Use it for collections, albums, or grouped items where many sit under one cover here.

items.name: components-cards-status-card
items.title: Status Card
items.description: A card showing a state badge, label, and short note together. Use it on dashboards to surface health, order, or system status at a quick glance.

items.name: components-cards-tilt-effect-card
items.title: Tilt Effect Card
items.description: A card that tilts under the cursor to follow its position closely. Use it for interactive feature tiles or showcases where slight motion adds polish.

items.name: components-collapsible-card-collapsible

items.name: components-collapsible-grouped-collapsible

items.description: Several collapsible panels stacked together so readers open one section at a time. Good for settings pages where related options sit in separate groups.

items.name: components-collapsible-icon-collapsible
items.title: Icon Collapsible
items.description: A collapsible row with a chevron icon that rotates as the panel opens and closes. Use it in menus where a clear visual cue tells readers it expands.

items.name: components-collapsible-shadowed-collapsible

items.description: A collapsible panel with a soft shadow that lifts it off the page. Use it to highlight an expandable block of content inside a busy layout or feed.

items.name: components-collapsible-side-bordered-collapsible

items.description: A collapsible panel with a colored bar down one side to mark its state. Use it for alerts or notes whose details readers can show or hide on demand.

items.name: components-collapsible-stepped-collapsible

items.description: Numbered collapsible steps that reveal instructions one at a time. Use it for onboarding or setup guides where readers work through tasks in order.

items.name: components-pagination-bordered-pagination

items.description: A pagination row where each page number sits inside its own outlined button. The clear borders separate pages cleanly across data tables and search results.

items.name: components-pagination-card-pagination
items.title: Card Pagination
items.description: Pagination wrapped in a raised card surface with page numbers and prev next controls. Groups navigation neatly below a list or grid of cards.

items.name: components-pagination-compact-pagination
items.title: Compact Pagination
items.description: A tight pagination row that fits page numbers, prev, and next into a small footprint. Good for sidebars, panels, and dense admin tables with limited space.

items.name: components-pagination-dot-indicator-pagination
items.title: Dot Indicator Pagination
items.description: Pagination shown as a row of dots, with the active page filled. Ideal for image carousels, onboarding steps, and short sequences where numbers feel heavy.

items.name: components-pagination-floating-pagination
items.title: Floating Pagination
items.description: A pagination bar that hovers above the content with soft elevation. Stays visible while readers scroll through long articles, feeds, or paginated galleries.

items.name: components-pagination-icon-only-pagination
items.title: Icon Only Pagination
items.description: Pagination built from chevron icons for previous and next, with no page numbers. Keeps mobile toolbars and image viewers clean when only direction matters.

items.name: components-pagination-mini-pagination
items.title: Mini Pagination
items.description: A very small pagination control showing the current page and arrows to step through results. Fits inline next to filters, counts, or table footers.

items.name: components-pagination-responsive-pagination
items.title: Responsive Pagination
items.description: Pagination that shows full page numbers on desktop and collapses to arrows on mobile. Keeps navigation usable across phones, tablets, and wide screens.

items.name: components-pagination-rounded-pagination
items.title: Rounded Pagination
items.description: A pagination row with fully rounded pill buttons for each page. The soft circular shape suits friendly product pages, blogs, and modern marketing layouts.

items.name: components-pagination-shadow-pagination
items.title: Shadow Pagination
items.description: Pagination with subtle drop shadows on each button for depth. The lifted look helps the controls stand out over busy backgrounds and image grids.

items.name: components-pagination-split-pagination
items.title: Split Pagination
items.description: Pagination with prev and next pushed to opposite edges and page numbers centered. Spreads controls across wide footers and full width content areas.

items.name: components-tabs-card-tabs
items.title: Card Tabs
items.description: Tabs styled as raised cards, where the active panel lifts above the rest. Great for settings pages or dashboards that group related content into sections.

items.name: components-tabs-gradient-tabs
items.title: Gradient Tabs
items.description: Tabs with a soft color gradient on the active trigger for a vivid accent. Use them on landing pages or feature views where the switcher should draw the eye.

items.name: components-tabs-icon-tabs
items.title: Icon Tabs
items.description: Tabs that pair a small icon with each label so options read at a glance. Good for navigation menus and toolbars where space is tight and clarity matters.

items.name: components-tabs-minimal-tabs
items.title: Minimal Tabs
items.description: Clean tabs with a thin underline marking the active item and no extra borders. Fits content heavy pages where the switcher should stay quiet and unobtrusive.

items.name: components-tabs-outline-tabs
items.title: Outline Tabs
items.description: Tabs wrapped in a light border that frames each trigger and the active panel. Suits forms or profile screens that need clear structure between grouped fields.

items.name: components-tabs-pill-tabs
items.title: Pill Tabs
items.description: Tabs shaped as rounded pills with a filled background on the active one. Ideal for filter bars and segmented controls that toggle between a few short views.

items.name: components-tabs-shadow-tabs
items.title: Shadow Tabs
items.description: Tabs where the selected trigger gains a subtle drop shadow for depth and focus. Works well on cards and panels that need a tactile, layered feel to the switch.

items.name: components-tabs-vertical-tabs
items.title: Vertical Tabs
items.description: Tabs stacked in a sidebar column with panels rendered to the right. Built for settings, account, and documentation pages with many sections to navigate.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-accessibility-sections-accessibility-feedback-card

items.description: A dated changelog of real fixes credited by first name, with a two day reply promise and a report button.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-accessibility-sections-accessibility-statement

items.description: Dated statement pairing what works with three named gaps, quarter targets, and the next review date.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-accessibility-sections-accessible-packaging-card

items.name: ecommerce-pro-accessibility-sections-keyboard-and-screen-reader-guide

items.description: Real keyboard paths for search, cart, and checkout, rough edges named, and a direct developer inbox.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-account-overview-dashboard
items.title: Account Overview Dashboard
items.description: Next delivery, guarantee clocks, credit balance, and subscription as four linked cards, none a feed.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-account-overview-tiles

items.description: The account dashboard where every tile reports a live fact instead of a label.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-account-security-card
items.title: Account Security Card
items.description: Passkey first, password demoted, sessions visible with sign out everywhere.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-data-privacy-controls
items.title: Data Privacy Controls
items.description: View, download, and delete as buttons, generated on the spot, no support form.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-download-your-data-card
items.title: Download Your Data Card
items.description: One button, the export by email in minutes, with contents and absences listed honestly.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-email-history-log

items.description: Every email sent to this account as a dated list, each row naming the reason it was sent.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-guarantee-registrations-list
items.title: Guarantee Registrations List
items.description: Every owned product with its guarantee clock, expired ones kept for the bench.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-household-accounts-card
items.title: Household Accounts Card
items.description: Two adults, one address, separate logins and wishlists, shared history by consent, one membership.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-loyalty-points-card
items.title: Loyalty Points Card
items.description: Store credit in dollars with a plain ledger, money not points, never expires.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-notification-preferences
items.title: Notification Preferences
items.description: Every email type on a working switch with honest cadence, locked rows explained.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-notification-preferences-panel
items.title: Notification Preferences Panel
items.description: Topic and channel checkboxes with marketing off by default and order updates locked on with the reason.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-order-again-grid
items.title: Order Again Grid
items.description: Consumables sorted by what runs out, the bag listed with anti rebuy advice.

items.name: ecommerce-pro-account-sections-order-history-list
items.title: Order History List
items.description: Past orders with state matched actions, track, buy again, and the return kept visible.

items.name: ecommerce-ecommerce-footers-muti-column
