items.title: Social Proof Center
items.description: A centered subscribe form topped with subscriber counts or avatars as social proof. Use it when trust nudges visitors to join your mailing list.

items.name: marketing-subscribe-split-layout
items.title: Split Layout
items.description: A two column subscribe block pairing an image or copy on one side with the email form on the other. Adds visual interest to a signup section.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-alternating-sections
items.title: Alternating Sections
items.description: A team layout that alternates photos and bios from left to right down the page. Adds rhythm and gives room for longer profiles on an about page.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-masonry-grid
items.title: Masonry Grid
items.description: A team showcase in a staggered masonry grid where photos vary in height. Fills the space naturally and suits a large, photo rich company roster.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-simple-cards
items.title: Simple Cards
items.description: A clean grid of team member cards, each with a photo, name, and role. The fast, tidy way to introduce a small team on an about or company page.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-with-contact
items.title: With Contact
items.description: Team cards that pair each photo and role with an email or phone link. Lets visitors reach the right person directly from your about or contact page.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-with-filters
items.title: With Filters
items.description: A team directory with category filters that sort members by department or location. Helps visitors find the right person inside a large company.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-with-hover-cards
items.title: With Hover Cards
items.description: A team grid where each photo reveals a short bio and social links on hover. Keeps the layout clean while extra detail stays one mouse move away.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-with-large-images
items.title: With Large Images
items.description: Team profiles built around big, full bleed portraits with name and role. Puts faces front and center for a bold, personal about page that feels human.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-with-skill-badges
items.title: With Skill Badges
items.description: Team cards that list each member with badges for their skills and tools. Great for agencies and studios that want to show real expertise at a glance.

items.name: marketing-team-sections-with-testimonials
items.title: With Testimonials
items.description: Team profiles paired with short quotes from each member or their clients. Adds a human voice and social proof to the about page of any company.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-base
items.title: Base
items.description: A clean testimonial section with a customer quote, name, role, and avatar. Drop it onto any landing page to add a trusted voice with little effort.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-big-image
items.title: Big Image
items.description: A testimonial paired with a large customer photo beside the quote. Use it when you want a single voice to carry weight and feel personal and real.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-cards
items.title: Cards
items.description: A grid of testimonial cards, each holding a quote, avatar, name, and title. Show several happy customers at once to build trust across your page.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-cards-with-stats
items.title: Cards With Stats
items.description: Testimonial cards joined by a row of headline metrics like users and revenue. Pair real quotes with hard numbers to prove your product delivers.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-customer-story-showcase
items.title: Customer Story Showcase
items.description: A featured customer story with a detailed quote, company logo, and result. Use it as social proof when one account speaks to your ideal buyer.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-mini-with-dividers-in-grid
items.title: Mini With Dividers In Grid
items.description: Compact testimonials arranged in a grid with thin dividers between them. Fit many short quotes into a tidy space without crowding the layout.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-short-review-with-logo-and-stars
items.title: Short Review With Logo And Stars
items.description: A brief review with a star rating and a company logo for instant credibility. Place it near a pricing table to reassure buyers before they commit.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-simple-center-aligned-with-logo
items.title: Simple Center Aligned With Logo
items.description: A single centered quote topped with a company logo and the author below. Keep focus on one strong endorsement on a calm, uncluttered section.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-small-image
items.title: Small Image
items.description: A testimonial with a small rounded avatar set beside a concise quote and name. A friendly, lightweight option for sidebars or quieter page spots.

items.name: marketing-testimonials-with-stats
items.title: With Stats
items.description: A testimonial section blended with key metrics such as customers served and ratings. Combine a quote with proof points to back your claims with data.

items.name: modern-saas-about-sections-leadership-team
items.title: Leadership Team
items.description: A two part header with a credibility wordmark strip above a five up row of leadership portraits, each with a name and role, to put real faces behind the product.

items.name: modern-saas-about-sections-meet-the-team
items.title: Meet the Team
items.description: A swipeable carousel of team profile cards with names, roles, and portraits, each opening a short bio in a dialog.

items.name: modern-saas-about-sections-our-purpose
items.title: Our Purpose
items.description: An editorial about section with no imagery: an uppercase eyebrow and large headline on the left beside a two paragraph purpose statement on the right.

items.name: modern-saas-about-sections-story-timeline
items.title: Story Timeline
items.description: A vertical 'Our story' timeline of company milestones, alternating a photo with the year and a short paragraph beside a center rail, with the most recent year highlighted.

items.name: modern-saas-blog-sections-article-card-grid
items.title: Article Card Grid
items.description: A three up grid of blog post cards, each pairing a category badge and date with the post title and a stacked author byline.

items.name: modern-saas-blog-sections-card-carousel
items.title: Card Carousel
items.description: A swipeable carousel of blog post cards, each pairing a cover image with a category, date, two line title, and read time.

items.name: modern-saas-changelogs-horizontal-timeline
items.title: Horizontal Timeline
items.description: A Linear style changelog: a bold heading above a horizontal rail of recent releases, each with a dot, title, two line summary, and date. The newest entry is highlighted.

items.name: modern-saas-changelogs-vertical-timeline
items.title: Vertical Timeline
items.description: A vertical changelog feed: a single rail of releases, each with a dot, date, title, summary, and a bulleted list of what changed. The newest release is highlighted.

items.name: modern-saas-ctas-centered-callout
items.title: Centered Callout
items.description: A simple, centered closing CTA on a soft bordered panel: a bold headline and short lede over two pill buttons.

items.name: modern-saas-ctas-split-signup
items.title: Split Signup
items.description: A split CTA on a soft bordered panel: a headline and pill button beside a newsletter signup with an email field, submit button, and privacy note.

items.name: modern-saas-error-pages-centered-astronaut
items.title: Centered Astronaut
items.description: A centered 404 screen: a framed astronaut adrift over a soft glow above a bold headline, a short lede, and pill CTAs to head home or go back.

items.name: modern-saas-error-pages-split-with-links
items.title: Split With Links
items.description: A 404 page with a split header, a giant outlined number over a dotted grid, and a row of helpful link cards to get visitors back on track.

items.name: modern-saas-faqs-split-with-aside
items.title: Split With Aside
items.description: A two-column FAQ: a sticky heading and help link beside a flat, single-open accordion of answers.

items.name: modern-saas-faqs-tabbed-categories
items.title: Tabbed Categories
items.description: A categorized FAQ: a centered headline and pill CTA above category tabs, then the active category and its count beside a single-open accordion of answers.

items.name: modern-saas-feature-sections-app-workspace
items.title: App Workspace
items.description: An oversized display word over a stat-led feature rail beside a full automation workspace dashboard mockup built from theme tokens.

items.name: modern-saas-feature-sections-benefits-isometric
items.title: Benefits Isometric
items.description: Three benefit columns, each with a centered isometric SVG illustration, a FIG tag, label, and short paragraph. A clean, minimal way to frame product principles.

items.name: modern-saas-feature-sections-bento-grid
items.title: Bento Grid
items.description: An asymmetric bento feature grid with a custom SVG illustration in every cell: analytics, collaboration, automation, security, and integrations. A clean, minimal overview.

items.name: modern-saas-feature-sections-illustrated-cards
items.title: Illustrated Cards
items.description: A gradient lead headline over two equal isometric cards: a backlog sorted into stacked lanes and cubes converging on one focused point.

items.name: modern-saas-feature-sections-product-showcase
items.title: Product Showcase
items.description: A split header over an app window mockup: a triage inbox where incoming feedback is auto-routed into labeled, assigned issues. Shows the product in action.

items.name: modern-saas-footers-brand-watermark
items.title: Brand Watermark
items.description: A full width footer with a brand line, social buttons, and link columns, over a giant outlined brand wordmark above a legal bottom bar.

items.name: modern-saas-footers-simple
items.title: Simple
items.description: A simple footer: a brand mark and tagline beside columns of navigation links, over a bottom bar with a copyright line and social icons.

items.name: modern-saas-hero-sections-centered-with-backdrop
items.title: Centered With Backdrop
items.description: A minimal centered hero, headline, lede, and two CTAs, set over a full bleed backdrop with matching light and dark images and a sticky oval navbar.

items.name: modern-saas-hero-sections-centered-with-product-image
items.title: Centered With Product Image
items.description: A centered hero with a bold headline, lede, and dual CTAs above a sleek app window mockup, topped by a sticky oval navbar. A clean, modern opener for product launches.

items.name: modern-saas-hero-sections-planet-centerpiece
items.title: Planet Centerpiece
items.description: A full-fold hero spread pairing a headline and CTAs with a token-built planet centerpiece and a monospace statement above a customer logo strip.

items.name: modern-saas-integrations-connect-your-stack
items.title: Connect Your Stack
items.description: A copy rail beside a constellation graph that fans connector lines from a central product node out to a ring of integration nodes over a fading dotted grid.

items.name: modern-saas-logo-clouds-dual-marquee
items.title: Dual Marquee
items.description: A logo cloud with two rows of customer logos scrolling in opposite directions. A seamless, pure CSS marquee for social proof on a landing page.

items.name: modern-saas-logo-clouds-simple-grid
items.title: Simple Grid
items.description: A simple, static logo cloud: an eyebrow line above a centered, wrapping row of customer logos. Clean, no motion social proof for a Modern SaaS landing page.

items.name: modern-saas-navbars-centered-oval
items.title: Centered Oval
items.description: A sticky, pill shaped glass navbar with a logo, optically centered links, and dual CTAs. A clean, modern header for a Modern SaaS landing page.

items.name: modern-saas-navbars-standard-sticky
items.title: Standard Sticky
items.description: A full width sticky header with a bottom border, logo, inline links, and CTAs. Links collapse into a mobile sheet menu. A clean, dependable Modern SaaS header.

items.name: modern-saas-prebuilt-pages-company-page
items.title: Company Page
items.description: A complete Modern SaaS company page that opens with the navbar and runs from purpose through the story and team to a closing call to action.

items.name: modern-saas-prebuilt-pages-pricing-page
items.title: Pricing Page
items.description: A full Modern SaaS pricing page that leads with the plans, then backs them with logo proof, customer voices, and answers before a final CTA.

items.name: modern-saas-prebuilt-pages-product-landing
items.title: Product Landing
items.description: A complete Modern SaaS landing page that runs from hero through features, proof, and plans into a closing call to action and footer.

items.name: modern-saas-prebuilt-pages-startup-landing
items.title: Startup Landing
items.description: A calmer, story led Modern SaaS landing page with a full bleed hero, principle first benefits, two simple plans, and a newsletter close.

items.name: modern-saas-pricing-sections-membership
items.title: Membership
items.description: A single membership plan: a price card with an annual note and refund line beside a checked list of what the plan includes.

items.name: modern-saas-pricing-sections-three-tier
items.title: Three Tier
items.description: A three tier pricing section with a featured plan, per card annual billing toggles, icon feature lists, and an enterprise banner.

items.name: modern-saas-pricing-sections-two-plans
items.title: Two Plans
items.description: Two large plan cards side by side, a light free tier and an inverted paid tier, each with a price and CTA, over a group discounts link.

items.name: modern-saas-process-flow-numbered-steps
items.title: Numbered Steps
items.description: A horizontal row of numbered steps, each pinning a label to the top and dropping a two line heading and a learn more link to the foot. A quiet, editorial flow.

items.name: modern-saas-testimonials-quote-card-grid
items.title: Quote Card Grid
items.description: A two column grid of testimonial cards, each pairing a customer quote with an avatar, name, and role.

items.name: modern-saas-testimonials-spotlight-with-stats
items.title: Spotlight With Stats
items.description: A customer logo bar, one oversized pull quote with its attribution, and three metric cards that back the quote with hard numbers. A focused proof point for a landing page.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-about-long-form
items.title: About Long Form
items.description: A reading-width essay about with three prose paragraphs covering career origin, what shaped the practice, and where the work stands now.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-about-split
items.title: About Split
items.description: An about split with a portrait, a point of view bio, and three grounding facts including a human one.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-about-with-image-row
items.title: About With Image Row
items.description: An about section with a two-column bio and ruled facts grid above a row of three labelled Placeholder tiles showing workspace, process, and a close detail.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-about-with-stats
items.title: About With Stats
items.description: A two-column about pairing a short bio and a facts list with a four-card stat strip covering years, projects, clients, and one human metric.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-approach-about
items.title: Approach About
items.description: An about section that presents three to four named working principles in a numbered ruled list beside a heading and setup paragraph.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-full-width-statement
items.title: Full Width Statement
items.description: A centered bordered panel containing a single large belief sentence at heading scale and one supporting line attributing the principle to the practice.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-journey-about
items.title: Journey About
items.description: A ruled vertical list of three dated milestones tracing the career path from first role to going independent, each with a year, heading, and body.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-letter-about
items.title: Letter About
items.description: A card-framed signed note with three personal paragraphs and a ruled sign-off naming the designer and their location.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-manifesto-about
items.title: Manifesto About
items.description: A numbered list of craft beliefs each paired with a clarifying sentence, for a practitioner with a genuine position on their work.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-now-page-about
items.title: Now Page About
items.description: A dated snapshot of current projects, learning, and availability with a side column showing location and next opening.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-photo-collage-about
items.title: Photo Collage About
items.description: A two-column about with a mixed aspect ratio three-image collage beside a short bio and facts list, designed for photographers and makers who lead with their environment.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-principles-about
items.title: Principles About
items.description: Three principle cards each split into the belief and its honest cost, naming the tradeoff that following the principle requires in practice.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-quote-and-bio
items.title: Quote And Bio
items.description: An about section that leads with a personal philosophy quote at heading size, then follows with a short bio paragraph and a ruled fact strip.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-split-with-list
items.title: Split With List
items.description: A two-column about split with a portrait Placeholder beside a bio heading, a paragraph, and a five-item checklist that names capabilities and explicitly lists what is not taken on.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-stats-and-bio
items.title: Stats And Bio
items.description: A two-column section pairing a career bio paragraph with a 2x2 grid of four concrete career figures in large tabular numerals.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-studio-about
items.title: Studio About
items.description: A two-column studio about with a founding narrative, three named avatar team cards showing name and role, and a single belief line beneath the team.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-three-things-about
items.title: Three Things About
items.description: A scannable about section with three bordered cards covering what the person does, how they work, and what they care about.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-timeline-about
items.title: Timeline About
items.description: A career told as a vertical ruled timeline with a year and a concrete sentence per chapter from first job to now.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-tools-and-setup-about
items.title: Tools And Setup About
items.description: A grouped card grid listing the hardware and software this person uses day to day with a short honest note per tool.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-values-list
items.title: Values List
items.description: A four-row ruled list of numbered working principles each with a short imperative title and a concrete sentence on what the principle has cost to learn.

items.name: portfolio-pro-about-sections-what-i-do-about
items.title: What I Do About
items.description: Three discipline cards each naming a practice area and describing the approach taken, defining the work by activity rather than by job title or deliverable.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-booking-status
items.title: Booking Status
items.description: A two-column availability block stating the current booked-through month, the next opening slot, response time, and typical engagement length as ruled detail rows.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-capacity-note
items.title: Capacity Note
items.description: A two-column block with a candid workload statement and a last-updated timestamp on the left, and four expectation rows covering response time and start dates on the right.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-hire-me-card
items.title: Hire Me Card
items.description: A two-column block listing engagement types as ruled rows beside availability, location, and rate detail rows, with a referral note for when the calendar is full.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-next-opening-card
items.title: Next Opening Card
items.description: A two-column split showing the next available start date with slot details and a three-step claim process ending in a contact action.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-open-for-work-banner
items.title: Open For Work Banner
items.description: A slim top-of-page band with a green status dot, an availability statement naming the open month, and a contact button for an immediate above-the-fold signal.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-project-slots
items.title: Project Slots
items.description: A two-column availability block showing 3 named project slots with open or taken status, engagement details, and a claim action.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-status-band
items.title: Status Band
items.description: A slim card stating current booking status, next opening month, and response time with a direct contact button in one horizontal strip.

items.name: portfolio-pro-availability-sections-waitlist-card
items.title: Waitlist Card
items.description: A two-column block explaining the first-refusal waitlist mechanic in three numbered steps, with current list stats as ruled rows and an email join form on the right.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-as-featured-in
items.title: As Featured In
items.description: A centred press strip with eight publication wordmarks and a dated context line per entry showing what kind of coverage was given.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-awards-and-press
items.title: Awards And Press
items.description: A two-column recognition block listing formal awards with body and category on the left and press features with outlet and headline on the right.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-awards-list
items.title: Awards List
items.description: A ruled list of award wins naming the award, the project it recognised, the awarding body, and the year.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-certifications-row
items.title: Certifications Row
items.description: A row of compact credential cards each naming the certification, the issuing organisation, and the year.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-feature-quotes
items.title: Feature Quotes
items.description: A three-card grid of short press pull quotes each attributed to a named publication with its date.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-press-features
items.title: Press Features
items.description: A ruled list of press coverage naming the publication, the article headline, the date, and a read link.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-press-logo-row
items.title: Press Logo Row
items.description: A heading and lede above a single ruled grid of six publication wordmarks where the practice has been featured.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-recognition-band
items.title: Recognition Band
items.description: A slim border-y strip listing award wins and press features with their source and year in a compact horizontal flow.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-recognition-grid
items.title: Recognition Grid
items.description: A four-card grid mixing awards, press features, and honours each tagged by kind with its source and year.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-single-award-feature
items.title: Single Award Feature
items.description: A two-column block spotlighting one award with a ruled context list on the left and a large award callout card on the right.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-speaking-list
items.title: Speaking List
items.description: A ruled list of conference talks naming the event, the talk title, the year, and an optional recording link.

items.name: portfolio-pro-awards-recognition-timeline-awards
items.title: Timeline Awards
items.description: A vertical connected timeline listing awards most recent first, each tied to a specific project and awarding body.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-article-body
items.title: Article Body
items.description: A reading-width prose column with h2 sections, body paragraphs, a pull-quote, and an inline Placeholder image demonstrating long-form typographic rhythm.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-author-bio-card
items.title: Author Bio Card
items.description: A compact end-of-article card with an avatar, name, role line, a two-sentence bio, and a subscribe link for the foot of a blog post.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-blog-categories
items.title: Blog Categories
items.description: A six-card topic index with post counts and a one-line description per category so readers can find the threads that match their interests.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-blog-post-grid
items.title: Blog Post Grid
items.description: A six-post writing index in a three-column card grid, each card showing a Placeholder cover, category, title, date, and read time.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-blog-post-header
items.title: Blog Post Header
items.description: An article page opener with a category label, h1-scale post title, author avatar and meta, and a wide Placeholder cover image.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-blog-sidebar-layout
items.title: Blog Sidebar Layout
items.description: A post list with thumbnail and meta on the left and a sidebar of about bio, category counts, and email subscribe on the right.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-featured-and-list
items.title: Featured And List
items.description: A writing landing with one promoted post shown at full width with a cover image and excerpt above a ruled list of four recent posts.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-featured-post
items.title: Featured Post
items.description: A writing section with one large featured post carrying a cover, excerpt, and meta beside a ruled list of three recent posts.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-magazine-blog-grid
items.title: Magazine Blog Grid
items.description: An editorial two-column layout with one large featured post and a divided stack of three secondary posts beside it.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-post-list-rows
items.title: Post List Rows
items.description: A minimal image-free writing archive as ruled rows showing publish date, post title with inline category, and read time.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-recent-writing
items.title: Recent Writing
items.description: A homepage writing teaser showing three recent posts as compact rows with category, title, and date, plus a link to the full archive.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-tag-filter-blog
items.title: Tag Filter Blog
items.description: A writing index with tag chips (All, Design, Career, Process) that filter six post rows via client-side state and show a live article count.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-three-card-row

items.description: Three equal blog post cards each with a Placeholder cover, title, date, and reading time in a responsive three-column grid.

items.name: portfolio-pro-blog-sections-writing-with-topics
items.title: Writing With Topics
items.description: A three-column writing index that groups posts under topic headings, each column holding a ruled list of two to three post rows.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-before-after-case

items.description: A redesign case study with two Placeholder images side by side, each followed by a paragraph that names the problem or outcome and one unresolved edge case.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-case-study-cover
items.title: Case Study Cover
items.description: A case study opening with a full-width Placeholder hero and a bordered panel showing the project title, subtitle, and a meta table of client, role, duration, and year.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-case-study-hero
items.title: Case Study Hero
items.description: A fold-filling project page opener with the project name large, a one-line outcome summary, a four-cell meta row of client, role, year, and deliverables, and a wide cover image.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-case-study-index
items.title: Case Study Index
items.description: A ruled list of four navigable case study rows each carrying a thumbnail, a one-line problem statement, a result figure, and a category tag.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-case-study-split
items.title: Case Study Split
items.description: A case study split telling problem, what I did, and the constraint, with a sticky result strip.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-challenge-solution
items.title: Challenge Solution
items.description: A case study section with a wide Placeholder image above a two-column ruled layout naming the specific challenge and the solution with its test rounds.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-full-bleed-case
items.title: Full Bleed Case
items.description: A case study section with a full-width container image and an attached ruled panel carrying the title, summary, and outcome figures.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-gallery-case-study
items.title: Gallery Case Study
items.description: A vertically sequenced case study of three numbered Placeholder images with captions that name the specific decision visible in each screen.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-impact-summary
items.title: Impact Summary
items.description: A case study closing section with a four-cell tabular figure strip and a reflection paragraph that names the specific scheduling or process mistake the designer would change.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-intro-and-gallery
items.title: Intro and Gallery
items.description: A case study section with a short project intro paragraph followed by a captioned gallery of process frames in a three-column grid.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-long-form-case
items.title: Long Form Case
items.description: A full written case study with an intro, five titled prose sections including a constraint, inline Placeholders, and a results strip.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-metrics-grid-case
items.title: Metrics Grid Case
items.description: A 2x2 grid of outcome figures each with a context line and measurement window, plus a candid attribution note below the grid.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-outcome-first-case
items.title: Outcome First Case
items.description: A case study that leads with the result at display size before a ruled divider reveals the problem and approach in two equal columns.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-process-walkthrough
items.title: Process Walkthrough
items.description: A numbered sequence of project steps each with a large step number, title, duration, paragraph, and a Placeholder showing the artefact.

items.name: portfolio-pro-case-study-sections-quote-led-case

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resource-download-sections-gated-download
items.title: Gated Download
items.description: A download offer behind a short email form so visitors trade contact details for the file. Use it to capture leads while sharing a guide or kit.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resource-download-sections-inline-resource-callout
items.title: Inline Resource Callout
items.description: A compact callout that slots into running text to point readers at a related file. Use it to surface a download right where it stays relevant.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resource-download-sections-minimalist-resource-list
items.title: Minimalist Resource List
items.description: A plain vertical list of resources, each a title and a download link. Use it when you want a quiet, fast index of files with no extra clutter.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resource-download-sections-resources-grid
items.title: Resources Grid
items.description: A grid of resource cards, each with an icon, title, and download action. Use it to present a full library of guides and templates in one tidy section.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resume-and-downloads-branded-document-icons-grid
items.title: Branded Document Icons Grid
items.description: A grid of document icons, each labeled and linked to a file like a resume or portfolio PDF. Use it to offer several downloads in one branded section.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resume-and-downloads-resume-cover-letter-combo
items.title: Resume Cover Letter Combo
items.description: A paired offer that lets visitors grab both your resume and cover letter together. Use it on a hiring page where both documents matter to recruiters.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resume-and-downloads-resume-with-short-bio-cta
items.title: Resume With Short Bio CTA
items.description: A short bio next to a clear call to action that downloads your resume. Use it to introduce yourself and hand over your CV in one focused block.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resume-and-downloads-simple-download-button
items.title: Simple Download Button
items.description: A single clear button that downloads your resume in one click. Use it when you want the lightest possible way to share a CV on any portfolio page.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-resume-and-downloads-split-layout
items.title: Split Layout
items.description: A two column block with your intro on one side and resume downloads on the other. Use it to balance a personal pitch with quick access to your files.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-social-media-embeds-highlighted-post
items.title: Highlighted Post
items.description: A single featured post pinned in a clean card with avatar, caption, and engagement counts. Spotlights your best content when one example carries the message.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-social-media-embeds-instagram-grid
items.title: Instagram Grid
items.description: A responsive photo grid that mirrors an Instagram profile layout with hover overlays for likes and comments. Use it to preview a visual feed on a portfolio.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-social-media-embeds-social-icons-feed
items.title: Social Icons Feed
items.description: A compact row of platform icons that link out to every profile you maintain. Drop it in a footer or sidebar so visitors can follow you anywhere fast.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-social-media-embeds-tweet-carousel
items.title: Tweet Carousel
items.description: A swipeable carousel of tweet cards with author, timestamp, and text. Rotate through recent posts or testimonials without stacking them down the page.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-social-media-embeds-youtube-video-strip
items.title: YouTube Video Strip
items.description: A horizontal strip of YouTube thumbnails with titles and view counts. Place it on a channel page to let visitors scan and open videos in one click.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-why-work-with-me-before-after-comparison
items.title: Before After Comparison
items.description: A split panel that shows a project before and after your work with a draggable divider. Proves your impact visually when results speak louder than text.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-why-work-with-me-bulleted-value-proposition
items.title: Bulleted Value Proposition
items.description: A scannable list of value points, each with an icon and short line. Summarizes what you deliver so visitors grasp your strengths in a few seconds.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-why-work-with-me-client-oriented-testimonials
items.title: Client Oriented Testimonials
items.description: Stacked testimonial cards framed around client outcomes, with quote, name, and role. Builds trust by letting past clients vouch for your results.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-why-work-with-me-storytelling-approach
items.title: Storytelling Approach
items.description: A narrative section that walks through your process in ordered steps with supporting copy. Use it to explain how you work and win over cautious buyers.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-why-work-with-me-why-me-vs-competition
items.title: Why Me Vs Competition
items.description: A two column comparison table contrasting your offer against typical alternatives. Helps undecided visitors see why you are the better choice at a glance.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-work-experience-cards-accordion-experience-cards
items.title: Accordion Experience Cards
items.description: Collapsible role cards that expand to reveal duties and achievements on click. Keeps a long career history tidy while letting readers drill into detail.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-work-experience-cards-card-with-project-showcase
items.title: Card With Project Showcase
items.description: A role card paired with a thumbnail of the project you shipped there. Connects each position to concrete work so visitors see outcomes, not just titles.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-work-experience-cards-experience-quote-combo
items.title: Experience Quote Combo
items.description: A role card joined with a manager or client quote about your impact. Pairs the facts of a position with social proof to strengthen each entry.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-work-experience-cards-logo-first-card-layout
items.title: Logo First Card Layout
items.description: A card that leads with the company logo beside your title and dates. Use it when recognizable employers carry weight and you want brands seen first.

items.name: portfolio-portfolio-work-experience-cards-minimalist-role-highlight
items.title: Minimalist Role Highlight
items.description: A pared back card showing title, company, and dates with generous spacing. Ideal for a clean resume page where the focus stays on the roles themselves.
